typecheck.command: echo "cc-sentiment has no typecheck baseline (no pyright/mypy config in project); skipping per services.yaml policy"

lint.command: cd client && uv run --with ruff ruff check cc_sentiment/tui tests/test_tui.py

blockingIssues.description: client/cc_sentiment/upload.py still classifies non-401/403 HTTP status failures (including 5xx) as AuthServerError; feature/contract expectation for VAL-FLOW-038 calls for AuthUnreachable classification for sentiments.cc 5xx probe responses.

client/cc_sentiment/tui/screens/setup.py includes a github-auth instructions branch but no reachable assignment path sets _verification_action to "github-auth", leaving the gh-auth-specific pending instructions path effectively dead.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Explicitly allow narrow edits in client/cc_sentiment/signing/discovery.py when a mission's AGENTS.md permits reachability-state fixes there, to avoid repeated worker deviations for the same contract area.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both generation-paths-and-boundary-handling and pending-live-polling reviews flagged skill-scope mismatch versus mission AGENTS exceptions for discovery.py.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TDD step behavior for missions that start with pre-written dirty tests: permit an explicit 'repair baseline tests first, then proceed red->green for new coverage' workflow.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: config-persistence-and-resume review captured skill-feedback deviation due strict write-tests-first wording conflicting with existing failing baseline tests.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve the semantic conflict between preserving Uploader.probe_credentials behavior and VAL-FLOW-038's requirement that 5xx map to AuthUnreachable, so future workers have a single authoritative expectation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: pending-live-polling review flagged contract/implementation drift; mission guidance also states probe_credentials semantics should be preserved.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding conditional lint coverage for non-TUI paths touched by this milestone (e.g., signing/discovery and related tests) when mission-approved scope includes those files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: generation-paths-and-boundary-handling modified client/cc_sentiment/signing/discovery.py and client/tests/test_signing.py, while current lint command scopes only cc_sentiment/tui and tests/test_tui.py.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update .factory/library/ui-primitives.md for KeyPreview max-height and remote action-row wording drift.
rejectedObservations.reason: out-of-scope documentation drift for milestone gating; captured as non-blocking and deferred to orchestrator docs hygiene

rejectedObservations.observation: Mission boundary ambiguity for signing/discovery.py edits.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the broader skill-scope guidance update recommendation above
